name: agent402-anthropic-tools
description: Drop-in Anthropic tool-use tools for Agent402.Tools: turn 1,338 pay-per-call x402 tools (browser, web search, OCR, PDFs, finance, memory) into Claude tool definitions via four meta-tools (find/route/call/about), plus the cross-seller x402 Smart Order Router. Free via proof-of-work or pay per call in USDC on Base + 3 more chains.
author: Mike Petrillo <mike@agent402.tools> (https://github.com/MikeyPetrillo)
